ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/dd-trace-dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-dotnet
Language: c%23
.NET Client Library for Datadog APM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DearVa/Everywhere
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DearVa/Everywhere
Language: c%23
Context-aware AI assistant for your desktop. Ready to respond intelligently, seamlessly integrating multiple LLMs and MCP tools.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Flow-Launcher/Flow.Launcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Flow-Launcher/Flow.Launcher
Language: c%23
🔍 Quick file search & app launcher for Windows with community-made plugins

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI Skills, MCP Tools, and CLI for Unity Engine. Full AI develop and test loop. Use cli for quick setup. Efficient token usage, advanced tools. Any C# method may be turned into a tool by a single line. Works with Claude Code, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor and any other absolutely for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MaterialDesignInXAML/MaterialDesignInXamlToolkit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MaterialDesignInXAML/MaterialDesignInXamlToolkit
Language: c%23
Google's Material Design in XAML & WPF, for C# & VB.Net.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NethermindEth/nethermind
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NethermindEth/nethermind
Language: c%23
A robust, high-performance execution client for Ethereum node operators.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantConnect/Lean
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantConnect/Lean
Language: c%23
Lean Algorithmic Trading Engine by QuantConnect (Python, C#)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StockSharp/StockSharp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StockSharp/StockSharp
Language: c%23
Algorithmic trading and quantitative trading open source platform to develop trading robots (stock markets, forex, crypto, bitcoins, and options).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture
Language: c%23
Clean Architecture Solution Template for ASP.NET Core

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jellyfin/jellyfin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jellyfin/jellyfin
Language: c%23
The Free Software Media System - Server Backend & API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/UIEffect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/UIEffect
Language: c%23
UIEffect is an open-source package that allows you to intuitively apply rich UI effects directly from the Inspector or via code. Combine various filters, such as grayscale, blur, and dissolve, to decorate your UI with a unique visual style!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thebookisclosed/ViVe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thebookisclosed/ViVe
Language: c%23
C# library and console app for using new feature control APIs available in Windows 10 version 2004 and newer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unoplatform/uno
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unoplatform/uno
Language: c%23
Open-source platform for building cross-platform native Mobile, Web, Desktop and Embedded apps quickly. Create rich, C#/XAML, single-codebase apps from any IDE. Hot Reload included! 90m+ NuGet Downloads!!
